programme.desc: A team of doctors tries to convince a young heroin addict to seek the help he needs.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Madrid
programme.desc: Cocaine is hidden in coffee bags and shoes; a young woman goes missing.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: The anti-drug police must discover what is hidden by two women who try to leave the country with suspicious objects attached to their bodies; the immigration agents must unmask the true motives of the trip of three foreigners.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: Agents detain newlyweds smuggling cocaine on their bodies, a nervous woman has cocaine wrapped around her legs, and a designer bag has been strategically stuffed with drugs.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: A divorced couple deny traveling together, but carry identical bags filled with cocaine; when a bag containing a white powder tests negative for cocaine, police decide to dig deeper.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programme.desc: A woman is arrested with her two children while trying to smuggle drugs abroad; a young woman breaks out in tears; a young man is thoroughly searched.

programme.desc: In the Jorge Chávez Airport, anything can happen: passengers try to transport illicit substances in their luggage or in their bodies, parcels with drugs hidden in their structures or impregnated in fabrics, and even innocent-looking old women.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: A newly-assigned director for counterterrorism spearheads the CIA's enhanced interrogation program to find those behind the attacks of September 11.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: The widow of a CIA officer killed in action chooses to take up the mantle, becoming the first woman to go undercover in Moscow and handle an important Russian source of the Cold War.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: A father's mission to bring justice to a feared member of the Taliban reaches a turning point when a teenage boy within his inner circle is captured during a raid.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: The unforeseen arrest of an American in Pakistan threatens a secretive mission in CIA.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: A former CIA chief of base utilises her knowledge in a volunteer effort to rescue people during the 2021 U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
programme.desc: For a CIA officer trying to recruit spies during a conflict in the Middle East, it can be hard to trust a mole within the al-Qaeda network, but it's even hard to keep him alive.
